---
title: "AI for Arctic Research Course"
---

# Cyber2A: AI for Arctic Research

The Cyber2A course is a free, modular set of training materials for Arctic researchers who want to learn and apply artificial intelligence methods. The course is published as a Quarto book and can be used for self-paced study, workshops, or teaching.

[Open the course materials](https://cyber2a.github.io/cyber2a-course/){.btn .btn-primary}

## Course Topics

- Introduction to AI and Arctic science
- AI-ready data, data annotation, and open data practices
- Neural networks, deep learning, and PyTorch
- Permafrost and Arctic data applications
- Instance segmentation and deep learning libraries for image analysis
- AI workflows, MLOps, foundation models, ethics, and reproducibility

## Use the Materials

The course materials are designed as reusable modules. You can work through the full course in sequence or use individual lessons as references for specific topics.

- **Course website:** <https://cyber2a.github.io/cyber2a-course/>
- **Course DOI:** <https://doi.org/10.18739/A2222R77V>
- **Course repository:** <https://github.com/cyber2a/cyber2a-course>
